title: BELLE VOUS 12 Pack Craft Foam Blocks - 10 x 10 x 5cm / 4 x 4 x 2 inches - Square Polystyrene Foam Bricks for Modelling, School Projects, Sculptures, Floral Arrangements, DIY Arts and Crafts
features: CRAFTING FOAM BLOCKS: White foam bricks perfect for a variety of crafting projects. In this set, you will receive 12 square craft blocks that measure L10 x W10 x D5cm (4 x 4 x 2 inches) and weigh 8g. Our foam bricks are made from polystyrene and do not have any hard paper layering on them. This makes the surface smooth and ideal for all sorts of embellishments and customisation. The square blocks are odourless, non-toxic, and completely safe for older kids with supervision.

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL: Each crafting block is made with a rigid and durable material making them ideal for crafting and working with. They're lightweight and can even be used as protection when shipping your items/possessions. With a high density, you can cut, bend, sand and pin them any way you desire. Additionally, our foam bricks will also float. Embellish these blocks to make your projects using glitter, rope, twine, acrylic paints, glue, pins, ribbon, flowers, and much more.

FOR ARTS AND CRAFTS: The perfect set for plenty of different arts and craft designs. Use these bricks to make homemade sweet bouquets, fake cakes, display boards/backgrounds, photo mounts, and more. They are also the perfect size to use as a base for other crafts. They're great for model/scenery making. Perfect for teachers and students for classroom activities or school projects. Children will enjoy letting their imaginations run wild with these foam crafting blocks.

MAKE DIY DECORATIONS: Use your DIY handicraft skills to make many different holiday arts, party decorations, and table centrepieces. Stick faux/real flowers into the foam to create florist-style flower arrangements - keep them hydrated by letting them float on water to absorb it. These bricks are perfect to use at home, in the office, at college, school, or just about anywhere. Ideal for making handmade decorations for weddings, birthdays, Christmas, Valentine's Day, baby showers and more.

DESIGNED FOR LIFE: Every product in our collection is built with purpose, blending function and style. Our thoughtfully crafted designs ensure lasting reliability and convenience when needed, ideal for any occasion.
description: Belle Vous Craft Foam Blocks (12 Pack). White foam bricks perfect for a variety of crafting projects. What’s Included: -12 x White foam squares. Dimensions: -Each square measures: L10 x W10 x D5cm (4 x 4 x 2 inches). -Each square weighs: 8g.
